title: Aximia
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Aximia''' was the major southern continent of the planet [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. The continent was crossed from north to south by the [[Kystes' Spine]] mountain range.

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
